description_zh: 照片很模糊,无法判断细节
description_en: Photo is too blurry to assess details

expectations.rationale: must indicate photo quality issue + suggest retake
must NOT fabricate warnings on a blurry photo

qualitative_criteria_zh: 必须承认照片不清楚,不能瞎打分
建议主人重新拍一张(更亮/更稳/更近)
对每个无法判断的字段使用'无法从照片判断'之类的表述,不要编造
qualitative_criteria_en: Must acknowledge the photo is unclear — don't fabricate scores
For fields that can't be judged, write 'Cannot tell from photo' — don't invent details
